name: slidex
description: Codex plugin front door for slidex deck creation and HTML/PDF document workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Create slidex decks and open the local workbench.
interface.longDescription: slidex starts a loopback deck-creation workbench from Codex, bootstraps deck-local workspaces, and keeps the CLI as the source of truth for later HTML/PDF render, QA, and package stages.
defaultPrompt: Start a new slidex deck in this workspace and immediately open the slidex workbench in the Codex App Browser using Browser/@Browser when available.
Create a slidex deck called <deck_id>, open the local workbench in the Codex App Browser using Browser/@Browser when available, and save the initial brief from the workbench.
Run the slidex delivery workflow for an existing deck and verify render, QA, and package gates.
